summary: Tested Kit Management Feature bug fixes in KitDetailModal.jsx - All 4 reported issues verified as FIXED

issues: PLZ field may not be showing if location data in database doesn't have 'zip' field populated - code is correct but data may be incomplete
Page content appears empty briefly after navigation until Assets tab is clicked - minor timing/state issue

critical_code_review_comments: Filter cascade logic in filterOptions useMemo (lines 258-316) correctly implements cascading: Continent -> Country -> State -> City
Location dropdown (lines 840-857) correctly displays address and PLZ in two-line format when data is available
Navigation buttons use navigate('/portal/admin', { state: { activeTab: 'asset-management' } }) which is correct and doesn't cause logout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kit Assignment Modal (KitDetailModal.jsx) bug fixes verified. Navigate via Portal > Assets > Kits > Click kit row > Zuweisung tab > Select Europcar tenant. Filter cascade works correctly with Bundesland filter.

features_tested.TEST 1 - No black screen after Europcar: PASS - Dialog remains visible, shows '214 Location(s) verfügbar' message
features_tested.TEST 2 - Filter cascade (Bundesland -> S: PASS - After selecting Bundesland 'Berlin', Stadt filter shows only 'Alle', 'BERLIN', 'Berlin' (no other cities). Location count reduced from 214 to 10.
features_tested.TEST 3 - Location dropdown shows Address: PASS - Location dropdown displays two-line format with address info. Example: 'BERC01 - BERLIN CITY WEST' / 'KURFUERSTENSTR. 101, BERLIN, Berlin'. Code includes PLZ field (loc.zip) but data may not have ZIP values populated.
features_tested.TEST 4 - Neue Location button navigation: PASS - User NOT logged out. Navigates to /portal/admin page correctly. Asset Management content available after clicking Assets tab.

code_verification.filter_cascade_implementation: Lines 258-316: filterOptions useMemo correctly filters based on filterContinent -> filterCountry -> filterState to show cascading options
code_verification.location_dropdown_format: Lines 840-857: Two-line format showing location_id/name on line 1, address/zip/city/state on line 2
code_verification.navigation_button_fix: Lines 706-710 and 876-879: Uses navigate('/portal/admin', { state: { activeTab: 'asset-management' } }) - correct implementation
